channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 25 Fordwych Road, 15th May
item.description:
This pothole has been a serious problem since February. It has been reported multiple times, including under reference 8995687. Today, it has falsely been marked as fixed on both the outstanding reports. No work had been done and it remains a serious hazard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Fordwych Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged public tree, 15th May
item.description:
Today (15.05.2026) a transit van drove into the public tree outside of our property. There are still parts embedded in the trunk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 171, Green Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead pidgeon on council estate, 15th May
item.description:
There is a dead pidgeon outside the doors to flats 24-29.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 145, Grove Lane, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car illegally parked on pavement near St George’s Wharf, 15th May
item.description:
Car illegally parked on pavement, pushing pedestrians towards the cycle lane and road. This car is always here and has been for several months now. This was already reported in April and in March of this year.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Wandsworth Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car illegally parked on pavement near St George’s Wharf, 15th May
item.description:
Car illegally parked on pavement, pushing pedestrians towards the cycle lane and road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Wandsworth Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking sign defaced, 15th May
item.description:
This is happening a lot in this area where people keep spray painting over the parking signs to get out of paying for residents parking. Please could you alert the police and come to fix this? thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Langton Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Racism hate graffiti, 15th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ellen Close, Widmore, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): McCoid Way, The Borough, Greater London

item.title: Mattress on pavement, 15th May
item.description:
Mattress on pavement for at least 2 weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Reighton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Strong drain odour on Micawber St, 15th May
item.description:
Multiple times a day the drain outside our property creates an overwhelmingly strong and putrid stench of sewage. It is coming from the drain outside 15f Micawber st. This has been happening for years.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Micawber Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Abandoned vehicle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135B, Star Lane, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Broken porcelain basin on street, 15th May
item.description:
Please remove a broken basin on the street. Jagged edges, danger to pedestrians. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alpine Grove, Hackney, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement and road dangerous, 15th May
item.description:
Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement and road dangerous as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet
